articles.title: UP Weather Update: Severe Heatwave Conditions in Prayagraj; Lucknow and Kanpur See Rise in Temperature - Asianet Newsable

articles.full_text: On April 20, major UP cities like Lucknow, Agra, Kanpur, Noida, and Prayagraj will experience very hot and dry weather. The sky will remain clear in most areas. The situation in Prayagraj is most alarming, as the heatwave continues there. Overall, the heat has become much more intense across the state.
